GEN_GROUP_SUB_TITLE: View and manage your active events
MOVE_TRANSACTIONS_HINT: {{name}} has transactions. Move them to which member before removing?
MAIN_SUB_TITLE: Avoid worries when splitting expenses among friends
HERO_SUBTITLE: Create an event, add expenses, and instantly see how much each person owes.
VERSIONS_HINT: Every change you save is recorded here. You can review the diff and restore any earlier state.
PRIVACY_HEADLINE: Your expenses, none of our business.
PRIVACY_BODY: DivSplit runs entirely on your device, so your details and expenses stay private. No sign-ups, no email, no personal data — just simple, secure bill splitting.
MOMENT_HEADLINE: Live the moment, we handle the math.
MOMENT_BODY: Don't let a calculator get in the way of your memories. DivSplit works out the simplest way to settle up, so you can focus on the trip, the dinner, the people.
TRUST_HEADLINE: No one can quietly rewrite the bill.
TRUST_BODY: Every change anyone makes is saved as a reversible version and logged in the event history. If someone slips in an unfair charge or deletes a transaction that favored them, the whole group sees it — and anyone can restore the fair version in one tap. Trust, without accounts.
MAIN_TITLE: Split your shared expenses with ease
NAME: Name
NEED_SOME_DATA_TO_GET_STARTED: Need some data to get started?
SHARE_WARNING: This is a private link — anyone who opens it can view and edit this event. Share it only with the people splitting these expenses.
DELETE_TRANSACTION_HINT: You can restore it later from the event history.
WANT_TO_SEE_SOME_EXAMPLE_TRANSACTIONS: Want to see some example transactions?
ADD_REMAINING_TO_MEMBER: Add the remaining amount to this person
BANKER_HINT: Holds the prepaid funds and pays out refunds
EVERYONE_IS_SETTLED_UP: Everyone is settled up — no transfers needed
NO_EVENTS_YET: Nothing to split yet — create your first event
HOLDER_HINT: Holds the pooled top-up cash and refunds what's unused at the end
SPLIT_NOT_BALANCED: Assign the full amount on both sides before saving.
TX_INVALID: This transaction's split doesn't add up
PLEASE_CHOOSE_A_MEMBER_AND_AN_AMOUNT: Please choose a member and an amount.
